popupStyleSheet: --background-color: light-dark(var(--light-yellow-color), oklch(from black l c h));
--background-image-color: light-dark(oklch(from var(--light-black-color) l c h / 0.1), oklch(from var(--light-yellow-color) l c h / 0.1));
--text-field-background-color: light-dark(oklch(from whitesmoke calc(l - 0.05) c h / 0.9), oklch(from var(--light-black-color) calc(l + 0.07) c h / 0.9));
--text-field-border-color: light-dark(var(--yellow-color), oklch(from var(--light-black-color) calc(l + 0.1) c h));
--placeholder-text-color: light-dark(oklch(from black l c h / 0.25), oklch(from white l c h / 0.25));
--selected-text-background-color: light-dark(var(--yellow-color), oklch(from var(--yellow-color) calc(l - 0.05) calc(c - 0.005) h));
--label-color: light-dark(oklch(from var(--light-black-color) l c h / 0.9), lightgray);
--separator-color: light-dark(oklch(from black l c h / 10%), oklch(from white l c h / 10%));
--tag-pill-background-color: light-dark(oklch(from var(--light-black-color) l c h / 0.9), lightgray);
